title: Vasi's Quality of life recipes
description: A simple quality of life mod that adds new recipes
body:
A simple quality of life mod made by Vasi (me)

Vasi's quality of life mod aims to make the game easier with quality of life crafting recipes and items. This mod currently adds the following: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Sponge crafting recipe

- Blank smithing template

- Netherite smithing template recipe

- Trident head

- Trident handle

- Trident Recipe

- Heart of the sea recipe

- Name tag recipe
 
- Saddle recipe

- Gilded blackstone recipe

- various new recipies using logs
  
- Charcoal blocks (work like coal blocks)

</details>

# Modpack usage

You can include this in your modpack as long as credit is given
